## Editing.EditableCollection.save() method

Save the collection to its source file using FileTree persistence. Requires a sourceItem with a mutable FileTree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
save(): Result<void>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;void&gt;

Result indicating success or failure
